name: White Chocolate Raspberry
recipeIngredient: 32 oz Cream cheese; softened in microwave for 2 minutes
5 Jumbo eggs; shelled and warmed in microwave for 2 minutes
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Mix bread crumbs, sugar, and cinnamon in a 10-inch springform pan. Put butter and pecans in a ceramic bowl and place in microwave for 1 1/2 minutes on high. Add to crumbs, mix and pat on bottom and sides of pan.
Cake: Cream the cheese until light. Add the sugar and beat again. Add the eggs one at a time, beating after each. Add the cornstarch, vanilla, cream and mix well. Add chocolate and mix well. Stir in raspberries, gently, or drop in carefully after pouring batter into pan. Pour into pan. Place in preheated oven with a pan of water placed on the bottom rack. Bake at 350 for 1-1/2 hours. Cake will appear done around edges and still be soft in middle. Turn off the oven and run a knife around the edge when it's safe to do so, but if possible, let it cool in the oven with the door cracked for a while. Cool several hours. Top with Raspberry topping.
Topping: Mix cornstarch and sugar VERY WELL in a small saucepan. Add the berries and water and stir. Heat over medium heat until thick, bubbly and sauce clears (at least mostly clears). If desired, add 2 tablespoons rum. Pour over the cheesecake.
